title: Technical Support Operator
summary:
THIS IS WHO YOU ARE… 
 You are our front line in the battle for exceptional customer experience at the 24/7/365 help desk. 
 Ideally, you have experienced terrible web hosting customer service and have vowed that will never happen on your watch! 
 You are responsible for seeing that our customers have excellent customer service by doing what you do every day -> exceeding customer expectations.

title: Junior Project Coordinator
summary:
C4Media, Inc.  is seeking a motivated, fully remote  Junior Project Coordinator (contractor)  to join our global team. In this role, you will provide essential support for our expanding online learning and certification cohorts.

title: Customer Support Representative
summary:
Company Description 
   
 AutoHDR is an AI real estate photo editing platform. We launched less than a year ago and already edit 25% of U.S. real estate listings. 
   
 We’re building a category-defining product and looking for people who want to help us scale it fast. This is an early hire on a small team of A players changing the industry.

 We’re hiring a Customer Support Rep to own inbound support and make sure the product is delivered well to users.

title: Full-Stack Developer
summary:
We are looking for a strong Full-Stack Developer to execute product features and contribute to our core platform development. Your focus will be clean, scalable implementation and high-quality execution. This role is ideal for a developer who enjoys building real product features end-to-end in a focused, no-bureaucracy environment. 
   
 Responsibilities 
 
 Implement frontend features using TypeScript 
 Develop backend services and APIs using Supabase / PostgreSQL 
 Contribute to our Python-bas

title: Java Developer – Fresher (TCS NextStep)
summary: Visit TCS NextStep portal for all fresher openings including Java roles.

title: Systems Engineer / Technology Analyst – Fresher
summary: Infosys hires 0-2 year exp freshers as Systems Engineers and Technology Analysts. Java, Spring, and J2EE are core tech stacks.

title: Project Engineer / Junior Associate Software Engineer
summary: Wipro hires freshers via Elite NTH and Turbo programs. Java, Spring Boot, and microservices roles available. Check the Wipro careers portal for active drives.

title: GenC / GenC Next – Software Developer (Java)
summary: Cognizant GenC program hires freshers for developer roles. Strong Java track available. Check the freshers section on the Cognizant careers portal.

title: Graduate Engineer Trainee – Java / Software
summary: HCLTech regularly hires GETs and junior developers. Java, Spring Boot roles available. Check their careers portal for active drives.

title: Software Engineer / Analyst (Fresher) – Java
summary: Capgemini hires freshers in large batches. Java, Spring Boot, and J2EE are common stacks. Off-campus drives announced regularly.

title: Software Engineer Trainee – Java / Full Stack
summary: Tech Mahindra SMART Hiring program for freshers. Java, Spring, Angular roles. 3.25 LPA average for freshers.

title: Associate Software Engineer (Fresher) – Java/Full Stack
summary: Accenture hires fresher batches as ASE/AASE. Java and Spring Boot roles are very common. Check careers portal for active drives.

title: Junior Java Developer / Associate Engineer
summary: Mphasis frequently hires Java freshers for banking & fintech projects. 4-5 LPA for freshers.

title: Associate Software Engineer – Java / Spring Boot
summary: Persistent is one of India's best product-focused companies. ASE roles for Java freshers with good salary (5-6 LPA).

title: Junior Software Engineer / Trainee – Java
summary: Hexaware hires Java freshers regularly. Strong automation and Java microservices focus. Fresher salary 3-4 LPA.

title: Associate Engineer / Software Trainee – Java
summary: Zensar Technologies (RPG Group) actively hires Java freshers. 3-5 LPA salary range. Great work culture for freshers.

title: Junior Software Developer – Java / Spring
summary: Coforge (formerly NIIT Technologies) is an underrated IT company with strong Java hiring. Good projects in banking and insurance domains.

title: Junior Java Developer / Technology Analyst
summary: Mastech Digital hires Java freshers for US-facing projects. Good learning environment with digital transformation work.

title: Software Engineer Trainee / Associate – Java
summary: LTIMindtree (L&T + Mindtree merge) has strong Java hiring for freshers. Banking and insurance domain projects. 3.5-5 LPA.

title: Associate Professional Software Engineer – Java
summary: DXC Technology is an underrated IT giant that hires large fresher batches. Java and Spring Boot are core stacks. Good salary and learning.

title: Software Engineer / Associate – Java, Spring Boot
summary: Happiest Minds is a born-digital company with strong Java focus. Great culture and learning for freshers. 4-6 LPA.

title: Junior Software Developer – Java / Backend
summary: KPIT focuses on automotive software but has strong Java backend roles. Underrated company for freshers. 4-5.5 LPA.

title: Trainee Engineer / Junior Developer – Java
summary: Cyient engineering services company hires Java freshers for digital transformation projects. Good work-life balance.

title: Software Engineer – Java / Spring Boot
summary: Sonata Software is a Bangalore-based IT company with strong Java hiring. Microsoft & SAP partner. Good freshers program.

title: Associate Programmer / Junior Java Developer
summary: Birlasoft (CK Birla Group) is an underrated IT company with Java-heavy projects. Good salary 3.5-5 LPA for freshers.

title: Graduate Engineer Trainee – Software / Java
summary: Tata Elxsi is a premium engineering company. Java roles for embedded and digital domains. Competitive salary 4-7 LPA for freshers.

title: Junior Software Engineer – Java, Embedded
summary: Sasken does product engineering for global clients. Java and embedded roles for freshers. Underrated gem in Bangalore.

title: Software Engineer Trainee – Java / Spring
summary: R Systems is an underrated company with Java-heavy digital projects. Freshers with Java skills are regularly hired.

title: Associate Software Engineer – Java / Microservices
summary: YASH Technologies is growing fast. Java and SAP hybrid roles for freshers. Indore base is great for tier-2 city candidates. 3.5-5 LPA.

title: Junior Java Developer / Software Trainee
summary: Infobeans is a growing Indore-based IT company. Very Java-heavy stack. Great for tier-2 city candidates. Fresher salary 3-4.5 LPA.

title: Associate Staff Engineer – Java / Spring Boot
summary: Nagarro is a premium engineering company. Strong Java track for freshers. Known for great engineering culture and growth opportunities.

title: Software Engineer I – Java / Backend
summary: GlobalLogic (Hitachi Group) does product engineering. Java backend roles for freshers. Known for good learning environment.

title: Junior Java Developer / Trainee
summary: Virtusa focuses on banking domain with heavy Java usage. Freshers are hired for Java/Spring Boot projects. 3.5-5 LPA.

title: Junior Software Engineer / Technology Analyst – Java
summary: NTT Data is a top global IT firm that hires Java freshers. Good salary 4-5.5 LPA. Banking and telecom domain Java projects.

title: Junior Software Engineer – Java / Spring
summary: EPAM is one of the world's best engineering companies. Java roles for freshers with strong DSA skills. Great career growth. 5-7 LPA.

title: Associate Software Developer – Java / Cloud
summary: Oracle directly hires Java developers. ADE / Associate roles for freshers in their cloud and database divisions. 6-10 LPA range.

title: Software Engineer – Java (Fresher / Associate)
summary: JPMorgan's tech centers in India hire Java engineers. Strong fintech exposure. Competitive pay 8-14 LPA for freshers with good DSA.

title: Graduate Analyst / Junior Java Developer – Technology
summary: Deutsche Bank's Pune and Bangalore tech centers hire Java developers. Banking domain with strong Spring Boot usage. 6-10 LPA.

title: Graduate Developer / Junior Consultant – Java
summary: ThoughtWorks is legendary for engineering culture. Java roles with TDD, pair programming. Competitive pay for freshers 6-8 LPA.
